title: Gold Balloons, Heart Balloons, Anniversary Balloon, 12Pcs 18 Inch Metallic Gold Heart Shaped Foil Balloon with Ribbon & Straw for Wedding Engagement Party Decoration
features: 1. Complete Decoration Set: This package contains 12pcs 18-inch gold heart balloons, a straw, and a ribbon for instant setup. Crafted from metallic-aluminium foil, these durable balloons maintain their lustrous shine for extended periods, perfect for gold birthday decorations, wedding balloons, or prom balloons. Their elegant design enhances both indoor and outdoor event themes effortlessly.

2. Premium Metallic Material: Unlike standard latex options, our aluminium-foil gold heart balloons offer superior puncture resistance and a sleek reflective finish. Compatible with helium or air, they remain inflated longer for events like "will you be my girlfriend" proposals, memorial balloons, or festive birthday party decorations, ensuring lasting visual impact.

3. Versatile Celebration Essential: Designed for diverse occasions, from romantic weddings and Valentine’s Day to cheerful baby showers and New Year parties. The 18-inch gold heart shape adds a glamorous touch to Christmas gatherings, anniversaries, or prom nights, seamlessly blending with themed colour schemes and décor styles.

4. Hassle-Free Setup: Simply inflate using a pump or helium tank, then secure with the included ribbon for a polished look. The lightweight design and pre-attached tabs make arranging these 12pcs metallic balloons effortless, whether creating arches, centrepieces, or backdrop displays for birthdays or wedding receptions.

5. Versatile Celebration Use: From birthday party wall displays to creative garden party accessories arrangements, this gold balloons set adapts to multiple spaces. Coordinates perfectly with door arches, or as standalone focal points for unified themed celebrations.
